markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX Labs and Newo for AI-assisted content creation and marketing strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Newo offers an AI employee platform for businesses, specializing in lead conversion across various industries](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs provides AI-assisted content creation services, focusing on high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Potential collaboration opportunities exist in content creation for Newo's partner and customer-facing materials](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs' pricing starts at $9,000/month for editorial content and $12,000/month for programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

## Topics

### Newo's AI Employee Platform

  - [Platform where businesses hire AI employees for tasks like phone calls and text messages](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Industry-agnostic, multi-language capable](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Aims to help businesses convert and retain leads](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Customizable agents with powerful tools and integrations](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Founded by Pavel, who has 15 years of experience in conversational AI (co-founded Dialogflow, now part of Google)](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI workflows to enhance human editors' productivity (10-20x more efficient)](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [40-50 step process from concept to final output](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Incorporates company information, brand documents, and product details](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Utilizes various APIs (SEMrush, Ahrefs) for keyword data and research](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Focuses on high-quality, well-researched content with proper citations and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

### Client Examples and Use Cases

  - [Reddit: Producing high-quality content at scale for a fraction of the cost](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Ramp: Created per diem pages with government-sourced data and citations](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Hagen: Producing 500 content pieces monthly, including localization and translation pages](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas for Newo

  - [Creating landing pages for different partner types (web developers, marketing agencies)](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Improving existing landing pages for specific industries (wellness, cleaning companies)](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Enhancing ad campaigns and webinar content](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Possible integration with GrowthX Labs' marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)

### Engagement and Pricing

  - [90-day pilot period to start](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Pricing: $9,000/month for 25 editorial-style articles, $12,000/month for 100 programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Flexible contract lengths available after the initial pilot](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX Labs to send an NDA and add Newo to their Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Newo to review pricing and consider budget approval for the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Potential meeting in San Francisco when GrowthX Labs team visits in May](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Pavel offered to host the GrowthX Labs team at his restaurant in Los Altos](https://fathom.video/share/a6psBGGtUivZcmjxCxHDfjxZrmvm2SvS?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
